TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Faruk_Begolli, title = Faruk_Begolli, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Faruk_Begolli} }

S.FORM: kawas 1944, byacing 2 ru 14 ryax qu hintgan nya, metaq squ kawas 2007, 8 byacing ru 23 ryax hinqilan nya. 63 kawas qu qinnxan nya babaw rhzyal. hiya ga squliq ka pzyangay ega, ru mrhuw pgleng pzyangay ega, minkahul squ Kosowa, ko'ka nqu Arpania. hmzinas 60 msyaw qu kinnalay nya ega, mnaki squ qnxan na pkabalay ega aring squ kawas 1966 ru mucing 1980. kawas 1997 Begolli mwah sa Kosowa, pcbaq raygakuse p'ega; pzyang pucing knalay nya ega ga yaqu kawas te 2006, iy pucing spzyangay nya ega uzi ga kawas 2008, ru kyapun nag an ru wayal mhuqil squ 2007 la. qsuzyan nya Adil Begolli ga, mrhuw squliq ka pkbalay kamok na Telibi ru ega. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

kawas 1944, byacing 2 ru 14 ryax qu hintgan nya, metaq squ kawas 2007, 8 byacing ru 23 ryax hinqilan nya. 63 kawas qu qinnxan nya babaw rhzyal. hiya ga squliq ka pzyangay ega, ru mrhuw pgleng pzyangay ega, minkahul squ Kosowa, ko'ka nqu Arpania. hmzinas 60 msyaw qu kinnalay nya ega, mnaki squ qnxan na pkabalay ega aring squ kawas 1966 ru mucing 1980. kawas 1997 Begolli mwah sa Kosowa, pcbaq raygakuse p'ega; pzyang pucing knalay nya ega ga yaqu kawas te 2006, iy pucing spzyangay nya ega uzi ga kawas 2008, ru kyapun nag an ru wayal mhuqil squ 2007 la. qsuzyan nya Adil Begolli ga, mrhuw squliq ka pkbalay kamok na Telibi ru ega. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: kawas~ɕ ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, metaq s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ ****, * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ru ** rjax ħinqilan nja. ** kawas~ɕ qu qinnxan nja βaβaw rħzjal. ħija ɣa s~ɕquliq ka pzjaŋaj eɣa, ru mrħuw pɣleŋ pzjaŋaj eɣa, minkaħul s~ɕqu kos~ɕowa, koʔka nqu arpania. ħmzinas~ɕ ** ms~ɕjaw qu kinnalaj nja eɣa, mnaki s~ɕqu qnxan na pkaβalaj eɣa ariŋ s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ **** ru muʦ~ʨiŋ ****. kawas~ɕ **** βeɣolli mwaħ s~ɕa kos~ɕowa, pʦ~ʨβaq rajɣakus~ɕe pʔeɣa; pzjaŋ puʦ~ʨiŋ knalaj nja eɣa ɣa jaqu kawas~ɕ te ****, ij puʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕpzjaŋaj nja eɣa uzi ɣa kawas~ɕ ****, ru kjapun naɣ an ru wajal mħuqil s~ɕqu **** la. qs~ɕuzjan nja a*il βeɣolli ɣa, mrħuw s~ɕquliq ka pkβalaj kamok na teliβi ru eɣa. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
